current_life_events: I just ended a long-term relationship, and I'm now trying to figure out what to do next. My architect job feels stagnant, and I keep dreaming of a career in sustainable design, but I'm scared to make a move at 35.
mental_state: I feel adrift and self‑critical, questioning whether I can make a fresh start.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The recent breakup and career stagnation have triggered doubts about my future, and my perfectionist standards make me feel stuck in a cycle of overthinking and indecision.
